reasoning_summary: The AI uplift yields $80k‑$140k extra revenue monthly, translating to $32k‑$56k gross profit (40% margin). After subtracting $30k monthly infrastructure and maintenance, net benefit is $2k‑$26k. At the low end, payback of the $180k implementation cost would take ~90 months, far exceeding the 12‑month requirement; at the high end it is ~7 months, meeting the target. Approval is conditional on achieving at least a 5.6% revenue uplift (≈$112.5k extra revenue) to ensure a net benefit of $15k/month and a payback ≤12 months.
key_assumptions: Revenue uplift is uniformly 4%–7% of current $2M monthly revenue.
Gross margin remains constant at 40% for incremental revenue.
Monthly AI infrastructure cost is $22,000 and maintenance $8,000, total $30,000.
Implementation cost of $180,000 is incurred upfront and not amortized.
Net benefit is calculated as incremental gross profit minus monthly AI costs.
Payback period is computed as implementation cost divided by monthly net benefit, without discounting.
Leadership’s 12‑month payback requirement applies only after go‑live (implementation time excluded).
